##LOCALITY=Ramsorten drift, Langban, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Reddish brown to black short prismatic crystals and fragments associated with hematite, from type sample

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
